gdom
C) Kelp D) Spirogyra
8. Zoospore is — (Pg30, E)
A) Sexual spore in algae
B) Asexual spore in algae
C) Develop in zoosporangium in number
of four
D) Non flagellated spore
9. Fusion between one large static female
gametes and smaller motile male gamete is
termed as as seen is (Pg30, E)
A) Isogamous, Spirogyra
B) Oogamous, Volvox
C) Anisogamous, Fucus
D) Oogamous, Ulothrix
10. Eudorina show — (Pg30, E)
A) Fusion of flagellate similar size gamete
B) Fusion of non - flagellate similar size
gamete
C) Oogamous
D) Anisogamous
11. How many of following is an example of
isogamous Ulothrix, Spirogyra, Volvox,
fucus, Polysiphonia (Pg31, M)
A) 1 B) 2
C) 3 D) 4
12. Identify organism and label A, B, C, D
(Pg31, M)
al §—(B)
\o\ (A)
CNN (€)
I
(D)
A) Laminaria A = leaf B = air bladder C =
stripe D = holdfast
B) Fucus A = frond B = air bladder C =
stripe D = Hold fast
C) Fucus A = air bladder B = frond, C =
midrib D = holdfast
D) Laminaria A = leaf C = midrib D =
petiole
13. Algae are useful to man in—- (Pg32, M)
A) Fixation of almost half of total CO2 on
earth
B) Primary producer
C) Increase level of oxygen
D) All of these
14. Hydrocolloids are produced by — (Pg32, M)
A) Brown algae ( algin), carrageen(red
algae), Agar(brown algae)
